vibe: Dark luxury, premium boutique, high-end fashion/watches

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for sections. Avoid tight clusters.

grid_patterns.editorial_hero: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 (asymmetric: col-span-8 for main image, col-span-4 for text/cta)

layout.radii: rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px). Keep it sharp and editorial.
layout.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px subtle borders (border-white/10) instead of shadows for dark mode.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-medium hover:bg-[#B5952F] rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white/60 rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors

cards.product_card: bg-transparent border border-white/5 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 group. Image wrapper should have overflow-hidden. Image scales up slightly on hover.

components.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10 transition-all
components.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-none
components.badges: bg-white/10 text-white text-xs uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-none border border-white/10

motion.hover_states: Subtle and sophisticated. Opacity fades (opacity-70 to opacity-100), image scale (scale-105 duration-700 ease-out).
motion.micro_interactions: Underline reveal on text links. Button background fill on hover.

hero_background.description: Dark silk texture for luxurious hero or section background.

products.description: Elegant black leather watch with gears.
Elegant wristwatch inside a black box.
Close up of a watch on a black surface.
Couple of watches inside a case.

technical_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').
technical_rules.accessibility: Ensure text contrast on dark backgrounds. Use aria-labels for icon buttons.
technical_rules.components_library: Use Shadcn UI for logic-heavy components (Tabs, Select, Dialog, Slider), but strip default Vercel-look and apply dark luxury theme overrides.

specific_features.whatsapp_integration: Use standard wa.me/ links for inquiries with a dedicated WhatsApp icon button on product pages.
specific_features.export_functionality: Include a button to export the catalog view to CSV.
specific_features.admin_dashboard: Hidden route (/admin). Use a denser 'Swiss High-Contrast' variant of the dark theme for data tables (clear borders, high utility).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Tailwind with the specified colors and fonts. 2. Build the layout (Header, Footer, Main Content). 3. Create the Product Catalog Grid with filtering/sorting. 4. Build the Product Detail Page with WhatsApp inquiry. 5. Implement Cart/Favorites using React Context or Zustand. 6. Build the Admin Dashboard. 7. Use the provided product images as seed data for the catalog. 8. Ensure all data-testid are in place.
